results.description: Applications for Outstanding Teacher Award open until July 31.

results.title: Traffic snarls worsen around Kochi metro extension, NHAI flyover worksites
results.description: Traffic snarls in Kochi worsen due to poor site management and potholes at metro and NHAI construction worksites.

results.title: Police Ban Tourist Entry To Pandavkada, Taloja Hill & Other Monsoon Hotspots In Kharghar To Prevent Deaths
results.description: Police have imposed a complete ban on tourist entry to several monsoon hotspots in Kharghar and Taloja, including Pandavkada Waterfall and Owe Camp Dam, under Section 163 of the BNSS, 2026. The move aims to prevent drowning deaths and accidents during heavy rains. Authorities said strict legal action will be taken against violators entering restricted hazardous zones.

results.title: Claude Fable returns, Meta AI is reading minds and Sam Altman bets on gadgets – Weekly AI roundup
results.description: Our weekly AI roundup detailing major breakthroughs and corporate shifts, including the re-release of Anthropic's Fable 5 and Mythos 5, Meta's mind-reading AI and "Pocket" app, OpenAI's new physical developer macro pad, OpenClaw's mobile launch, and multi-billion-dollar corporate AI contracts in India.
